title: tgt-vvp: Use signedness of expression instead of signal for index load

features.name: signed signal bit selection used as shift index
features.description: Code should include a signed signal with a bit-selection used as an index in a shift expression

features.name: expression signedness differs from signal signedness in index
features.description: Code should include an expression using a bit-selection of a signed signal as an index, where the expression signedness should be unsigned but the signal is signed
